name: google-earth-p0824-deploy
description: Deploy the bundled EU VW P0824 GEMMI donor payload to /mnt/nav/gemmi with on-car backup and minimal drivers.ini auth-bypass patching. SD-card only; does not modify lsd.jxe or firmware.
author: dspl1236
notes: Backs up the existing /mnt/nav/gemmi tree to /mnt/nav/.mmi3g_toolkit/google-earth-p0824/
Deploys bundled donor files from SD card root /gemmi/
Patches donor /mnt/nav/gemmi/drivers.ini with auth-bypass settings only
Does NOT patch lsd.jxe or remove VW RANGE_ locks
Tested on a US RNS-850 (HN+_US_VW_P0738) using the bundled HN+_EU_VW_P0824 donor payload.
uninstall: Use build_sd.py --uninstall to remove helper scripts only. Use google-earth-p0824-restore to revert /mnt/nav/gemmi.

release_zip.note: P0824 EU VW GEMMI binaries — downloaded at build time
